author: DominicVainMod
content:
Star Atlas Summer Kickoff Event - Starts in 45 Minutes,The Star Atlas Summer kickoff event starts in 45 minutes!    

Join us for a look at what’s coming over the next 4 weeks, earn tickets for your shot at the $15,000 Community Carnival, and unlock the first code to claim your exclusive Community Week badge! 

Don't forget to get your Community Week role in ⁠unknown 

 | See you in the ⁠🎤┃Atlas Amphitheater
